vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT
vars.description: Disables 1M context window. 1M model variants are unavailable in the model picker.

vars.name: CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE
vars.description: Percentage of context capacity at which auto-compaction triggers. Default ~95%. Only lowers; values above default have no effect.

vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW
vars.description: Context capacity (tokens) used for auto-compaction calculations. Defaults to model context window. Capped at the model's actual window.

vars.name: CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_CONTEXT_TOKENS
vars.description: Override the assumed context window. Only takes effect when DISABLE_COMPACT is also set.

keys.name: model_context_window
keys.description: Context window tokens available to the active model

keys.name: model_auto_compact_token_limit
keys.description: Token threshold that triggers automatic history compaction (unset uses model defaults)

keys.name: compact_prompt
keys.description: Inline override for the history compaction prompt
